Class TacletGoalTemplate

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.rules.tacletbuilder.TacletGoalTemplate
Direct Known Subclasses:
TacletGoalTemplate
public abstract class TacletGoalTemplate extends Object
This class contains the goal of a taclet. There are new sequents that have to be added, new rules and rule variables. The replacewith-goal is implemented in subclasses

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable>
    addedProgVars
    program variables added by this taclet to the namespace
    protected final ImmutableList<? extends Taclet>

    stores list of Taclet which are introduced
    protected final Sequent
    addedSeq
    stores sequent that is one of the new goals

    protected
    TacletGoalTemplate(Sequent addedSeq, ImmutableList<Taclet> addedRules)
    creates new Goaldescription same effect as new TacletGoalTemplate(addedSeq, addedRules, SetAsListOf.nil())

  • Field Details

    • addedSeq

      protected final Sequent addedSeq
      stores sequent that is one of the new goals

    • addedRules

      protected final ImmutableList<? extends Taclet> addedRules
      stores list of Taclet which are introduced

    • addedProgVars

      protected final ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> addedProgVars
      program variables added by this taclet to the namespace

  • Constructor Details

    • TacletGoalTemplate

      protected TacletGoalTemplate(Sequent addedSeq, @NonNull ImmutableList<? extends Taclet> addedRules, @NonNull ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> addedProgVars)
      Creates a new goal template for a taclet
      Parameters:
      addedSeq - new Sequent to be added
      addedRules - IList contains the new allowed rules at this branch
      addedProgVars - a SetOf which will be instantiated with an application time unused (new) program variables that are introduced by an application of this template

    • TacletGoalTemplate

      protected TacletGoalTemplate(Sequent addedSeq, ImmutableList<Taclet> addedRules)
      creates new Goaldescription same effect as new TacletGoalTemplate(addedSeq, addedRules, SetAsListOf.nil())
      Parameters:
      addedSeq - new Sequent to be added
      addedRules - IList contains the new allowed rules at this branch

  • Method Details

    • sequent

      public Sequent sequent()
      a Taclet may add a new Sequent as Goal. Use this method to get this Sequent
      Returns:
      Sequent to be added as Goal or Sequent.EMPTY_SEQUENT if no such Sequent exists

    • rules

      public ImmutableList<? extends Taclet> rules()
      the goal of a Taclet may introduce new rules. Call this method to get them
      Returns:
      IList contains new introduced rules

    • addedProgVars

      public ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> addedProgVars()

    • replaceWithExpressionAsObject

      public @Nullable Object replaceWithExpressionAsObject()

    • getBoundVariables

      public abstract ImmutableSet<QuantifiableVariable> getBoundVariables()
      retrieves and returns all variables that are bound in the goal template
      Returns:
      all variables that occur bound in this goal template
